title: STUDENT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: YOUTH CONTACT INC STUDENT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides alcohol and drug prevention services that include substance abuse counseling, anger management, and family counseling. 447 SE Baseline Street Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Students age 19 and younger who are enrolled in a participating Washington County school Hours: Monday-Friday, hours vary by service Email (503) 640-4222 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Agency phone (503) 640-4222 FAX (503) 640-0334 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Beaverton, Forest Grove, and Hillsboro School Districts TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Within two blocks of MAX and TriMet bus stops; TriMet bus line 57 TV Highway/Forest Grove Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Anger Management * At Risk Youth Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention Family Counseling Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNSELING SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YOUTH CONTACT INC
